source_jobs.title: AI Product Designer
source_jobs.description:
ResQ is an all-in-one facilities 🛠️ management platform built for fast-growing facilities and trades businesses. Thousands of service companies trust ResQ to streamline their repair and maintenance operations while enhancing profitability.



Our mission to "create economic empowerment for the service industry" drives everything we do. We are deeply committed to supporting local trades and facilities - the vital backbone of our communities. These unsung heroes pour years of grit, sweat, and sacrifice into building their companies, often facing significant challenges.



Many local service businesses face intense competition from larger corporations equipped with substantial resources and market advantages. ResQ is changing that by providing local businesses with intelligent, AI-powered tools that enable these businesses to operate more efficiently, intelligently, and profitably. We believe that when local service businesses succeed, entire communities 🫶 thrive. That’s why ResQ is dedicated to empowering the individuals who keep our world running smoothly.

Keep reading to learn more about the problem we are solving for our customers!



Hello 👋 Future ResQer!

ResQ is looking for an AI Product Designer to help shape the future of our AI-first platform. You'll lead the design of intelligent, customer-centric experiences, partnering closely with Engineering, Marketing, and our Operations team to turn complex problems into simple, intuitive solutions.



We're looking for a builder who thrives at the intersection of design and technology. You'll move quickly from ideas to prototypes to shipped products using a combination of Figma, AI-powered tools, and code. You'll help define product strategy, influence how we build AI experiences, and raise the bar for design across the company.



We know joining a team is a big decision, and we want you to understand who we are just as much as we want to get to know you. If you're excited by the ideas below, we'd love to meet you.



Are you nodding your head with excitement at the idea of:

 - Designing AI-powered products that solve real customer problems.

 - Using AI tools and code to rapidly prototype and ship ideas.

 - Partnering with Product and Engineering to shape product strategy.

 - Owning the end-to-end design process from discovery to launch.

 - Building intuitive experiences that make powerful technology feel simple.

 - Helping establish AI-first design practices as we scale.
   
   

What you will do:

As a Product Designer at ResQ, you will be contributing in the following areas:

 - AI Product Design💡: Design AI-first product experiences that solve real customer problems. Translate complex AI capabilities into intuitive, customer-centric experiences.

 - End-to-End Ownership: Own the design process from discovery and ideation through launch and iteration, ensuring a high-quality user experience every step of the way.

 - Rapid Prototyping 🛠️: Quickly turn ideas into interactive prototypes using Figma, AI-powered design and development tools, and code to validate concepts before launch.

 - Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partner closely with the Engineering team to shape product strategy, prioritize opportunities, and deliver impactful features.

 - User Research 💬: Conduct customer interviews, usability testing, and research to understand user needs and inform product and design decisions.

 - AI Experience Design: Design intuitive workflows for AI-powered features, automation, and intelligent recommendations that build customer trust and drive adoption.

 - Design Systems 💻: Build and evolve scalable design systems, reusable components, and UX patterns that create consistency across the platform.

 - Continuous Improvement: Use customer feedback, product analytics, and experimentation to iterate quickly and continuously improve the user experience.

Who you are:

 - 5+ years of experience as a Product or UI/UX Designer in a fast paced start up environment.

 - Comforta

source_jobs.title: Service Operations Manager
source_jobs.description:
ResQ is an all-in-one facilities 🛠️ management platform built for fast-growing facilities and trades businesses. Thousands of service companies trust ResQ to streamline their repair and maintenance operations while enhancing profitability.



Our mission to "create economic empowerment for the service industry" drives everything we do. We are deeply committed to supporting local trades and facilities - the vital backbone of our communities. These unsung heroes pour years of grit, sweat, and sacrifice into building their companies, often facing significant challenges.



Many local service businesses face intense competition from larger corporations equipped with substantial resources and market advantages. ResQ is changing that by providing local businesses with intelligent, AI-powered tools that enable these businesses to operate more efficiently, intelligently, and profitably. We believe that when local service businesses succeed, entire communities 🫶 thrive. That’s why ResQ is dedicated to empowering the individuals who keep our world running smoothly.

Keep reading to learn more about the problem we are solving for our customers!



Hello Future ResQer 👋

ResQ has launched — ResQ Services Group — our in-house commercial service division focused on delivering HVAC, refrigeration, food equipment, electrical, plumbing, and general repair services across North America.



As RSG continues to grow, we are looking for a Service Operations Manager to help build the operational foundation of the business from the ground up. This is an opportunity to join a fast-moving, tech-enabled service company where you will directly influence how service delivery, customer communication, dispatching, and operational execution scale over time.



As a Service Operations Manager, you’ll help drive the day-to-day execution of RSG’s service operations. You’ll work closely with technicians, customers, vendors, and leadership to ensure service work moves efficiently from request to completion.



This is a hands-on operations role for someone who thrives in fast-moving environments, communicates clearly, stays highly organized, and enjoys solving operational problems in real time. You’ll help coordinate scheduling, dispatching, customer updates, work order management, invoicing follow-through, and service quality while helping create structure and consistency as RSG grows.

What You’ll Do:

 - Coordinate and manage daily service work orders from scheduling through completion

 - Communicate with customers regarding service updates, timelines, delays, and next steps

 - Dispatch and coordinate technicians across active service calls and preventative maintenance work

 - Track open work orders, follow-ups, estimates, invoices, and parts requirements to ensure timely completion

 - Help prioritize emergency, urgent, and time-sensitive service requests

 - Support service documentation, job notes, photos, and work order accuracy through the ResQ platform

 - Assist with estimate follow-up, invoicing coordination, and administrative service workflows

 - Help maintain service SLAs, operational consistency, and customer satisfaction standards

 - Identify operational bottlenecks and recommend process improvements as RSG scales

 - Work closely with leadership to help build and improve day-to-day operational processes

 - Support after-hours or emergency coordination when required
   
   

Who You Are:

 - Highly organized and detail-oriented with strong operational follow-through

 - Strong communicator who can remain calm and professional in fast-paced situations

 - Comfortable working shift Work: 5 days a week. Shifts are typically 8am-4pm or 3pm-11pm with a mix of weekdays and weekends.

 - Comfortable managing multiple priorities, schedules, and customer needs simultaneously

 - Customer-focused with strong problem-solving and relationship management skills

 - Proactive, reliable, and comfortable taking ownership of operational tasks

 - Comfortabl

source_jobs.title: Paid Search and Marketing Specialist
source_jobs.description:
ResQ is an all-in-one facilities 🛠️ management platform built for fast-growing facilities and trades businesses. Thousands of service companies trust ResQ to streamline their repair and maintenance operations while enhancing profitability.



Our mission to "create economic empowerment for the service industry" drives everything we do. We are deeply committed to supporting local trades and facilities - the vital backbone of our communities. These unsung heroes pour years of grit, sweat, and sacrifice into building their companies, often facing significant challenges.



Many local service businesses face intense competition from larger corporations equipped with substantial resources and market advantages. ResQ is changing that by providing local businesses with intelligent, AI-powered tools that enable these businesses to operate more efficiently, intelligently, and profitably. We believe that when local service businesses succeed, entire communities 🫶 thrive. That’s why ResQ is dedicated to empowering the individuals who keep our world running smoothly.

Keep reading to learn more about the problem we are solving for our customers!



Hello Future ResQer 👋




ResQ is looking for a Paid Search and Marketing Specialist to help our customers establish and grow their online presence. In this role, you'll build and launch customer websites, create and optimize Google Ads campaigns, and partner directly with business owners to ensure they're set up for long-term success. If you're passionate about digital marketing, and thrive in a fast-paced environment, we'd love to meet you. This is a 3 month contract role with an opportunity for extension.




Are you nodding your head with excitement at the idea of:

 - Building websites that help businesses grow.

 - Launching and optimizing Google Ads campaigns.

 - Helping customers achieve their growth goals.

 - Using data to improve marketing performance.

 - Exploring new marketing tools and AI technologies.

 - Building scalable processes as we grow.
   
   
   

What You'll Do:

 - Paid Ads Management 💰: Create, launch, monitor, and optimize Google Ads campaigns. Continuously improve lead quality, conversion rates, and ROI through campaign optimization, keyword management, anding page recommendations, and performance analysis.

 - Website Development 💻: Build, launch, and maintain high-converting customer websites using ResQ's supported website platforms. Configure forms, tracking, SEO fundamentals, integrations, and analytics to ensure each site is ready to generate leads.



Who You Are:

 - 2+ years of experience managing Google Ads campaigns, either in-house or at a marketing agency.

 - Experience building websites using platforms such as WordPress, Wix, Squarespace, Webflow, GoHighLevel, or similar tools.

 - Strong understanding of Google Ads, Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, conversion tracking, and Google Business Profile.

 - Understanding of SEO, local search optimization, and landing page best practices.

 - Excellent analytical skills with the ability to interpret campaign data and make performance-driven recommendations.

 - Strong communication skills with confidence presenting results and working directly with customers.

 - Highly organized with the ability to manage multiple customer accounts simultaneously.

 - Tech-savvy and comfortable learning new software, AI tools, and emerging technologies.

 - Self-starter who thrives in a fast-paced, collaborative environment.
   
   

Nice to Haves:

 - Google Ads certification or experience managing paid search campaigns at scale.

 - Experience working with small businesses, local businesses, or home service companies.

 - Experience with Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, conversion tracking, and reporting tools.

 - Agency experience managing multiple customer accounts and competing priorities.

 - Experience using AI tools to improve workflows, marketing execution, or customer experiences.



Want to learn mo

notes: Small sample size, but diverse roles suggest a mix of functions.
